name: qwen_code
description: Generates correct, runnable Python/JavaScript/SQL code using Qwen3-Coder-Plus. Ideal for writing Supabase queries, API handlers, or frontend logic.

prompt.description: Clear natural-language instruction, e.g., 'Generate a Supabase Python client call to fetch interviews for user_id=123.'

content.description: The generated source code. Must be valid and executable.

language.description: Language identifier (e.g., 'python', 'sql') — must match input or be inferred.
